title: Recruitment for a Business Relationship Manager
body: "We have a vacancy for a Business Relationship Manager.  Job Title  Business Relationship Manager    Grade  SEO  Salary & Pension  £46,060 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  As the Business Relationship Manager, you will serve as a bridge primarily between the VMD, core-Defra, and its ALBs. You must thrive in dynamic, cross-functional environments.  You’ll act as a trusted liaison - ensuring effective collaboration, amplifying VMD’s policy positions, and demonstrating alignment with Defra’s wider delivery agenda.  How to apply  You must make your application via Business Relationship Manager - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  24 November 2025 "
